use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACTINIC KERATOSES BY PHOTODYNAMIC THERAPY

indications.text:
METVIXIA Cream in combination with Aktilite CL128 lamp red light illumination is indicated for treatment of thin and moderately thick, non-hyperkeratotic,
non-pigmented actinic keratoses of the face and scalp in immunocompetent patients. This photodynamic therapy should be used in conjunction with a...
